comment.body:
Indices are above all ema and sma levels. 5 tiny red days since a month (august 21st). Higher highs since April. The only theories I have seen calling for a downside since April from multiple furus has been macro events precipitating a fall. Cem being most famous. So far none of the windows have panned out since the admin is actively mitigating all windows. 

After May, June, July, August, September what probability chance October or last week of September brings more than a small 2% fall. Color me skeptical on that one.
